code:
import io
import string

fn abs_val(_ n: Int) -> Int
  if n < 0
    -n
  else
    n
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  mut token = ""
  mut have_min = false
  mut min_val = 0
  mut min_abs = 0

  while i <= n
    mut is_sep = true
    if i < n
      let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(x)
        x
      when None
        32
      end
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
        is_sep = true
      else
        is_sep = false
        token = "#{token}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
      end
    end

    if is_sep
      if not string.is_empty(token)
        let parsed = string.parse_int(token)
        match parsed
        when Some(v)
          let a = abs_val(v)
          if not have_min
            have_min = true
            min_val = v
            min_abs = a
          else if a < min_abs
            min_val = v
            min_abs = a
          end
        when None
          ()
        end
        token = ""
      end
    end

    i = i + 1
  end

  println("min_abs=#{min_val}")
end
